description: Dev-only capability written to `capabilities/dev.json` by `build.rs` when the `dev-commands` Cargo feature is on. Grants the frontend test harness and the in-app dev tray access to `dev_emit_toast` and `dev_start_demo_run`. Absent from release builds — the file lives outside `capabilities/` precisely so tauri-build's `capabilities/**/*` scanner only sees it when we opt in.
